It was at a meeting Of the corpora
tion and banking interests that
George Turner uttered the words at
tributed 20 him by the Spokesman

represented by A. L Davis and his
injunction suit with George Turner
as attorney. 1t IL no wonder that A.
L. Davis and George Turner are to-
gether today as they were on bread
riot day" in Spokane II years ago.
